UI_PIP_AutopsyWithTable_Tooltip: Perform autopsy using the nearby Autopsy Table for improved results.
UI_PIP_RVNoTable: No autopsy table detected in RV. Place one and enter the RV to register it.
UI_PIP_GetRemains_Tooltip: Remove remains from the autopsy table into a bag.
UI_PIP_ClearTable_Tooltip: Clean the autopsy table with bleach and a cloth.
UI_PIP_TableStatus_Corpse_Info: Autopsy in progress — table is occupied.
